use_cases: Hero section background for creative agency or portfolio websites
Decorative 3D visualization for tech product landing pages
Ambient animated backdrop for digital experiences and events
Portfolio showcase piece demonstrating WebGL expertise
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based 3D visualization rendering an abstract cathedral structure using ray marching and procedural generation with trigonometric functions. The shader animates colorful geometric forms based on time, creating a dynamic ambient visual experience suitable for hero sections or decorative backgrounds in creative portfolios and tech landing pages.
